title: rubus timbal-lagravei subsp. gracilior
intro: Rubus timbal-lagravei subsp. gracilior, also known as a subspecies of the fragrant raspberry (Rubus fragrans), is a plant species in the rose family, characterized by its fragrant leaves and edible fruits. The medicinal properties of this plant are attributed to its high content of antioxidants, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus timbal-lagravei subsp. gracilior include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant and antimicrobial activities, which may help prevent various diseases. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to leverage its medicinal properties and health benefits.
